_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 heterozygosity fosters de novo tumorigenesis but impairs malignant transformation.

_contextSnippet: there was no statistical difference (exact Fischer test value = 1) between the number of mice bearing a tumor in the Nf1 f/f group (14%) vs the K14 Cre; Nf1 f/f group (11%)
details: No statistical difference in tumor incidence between Nf1 f/f group (14%) vs K14 Cre; Nf1 f/f group (11%) in DMBA/TPA-induced skin carcinogenesis
